ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cargo_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cargo activity record */,
  "activity_period" TEXT /* Period when the activity occurred (YYYYMM) */,
  "operating_airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operating airline */,
  "published_airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the published airline */,
  "geo_summary_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographical summary */,
  "geo_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographical region */,
  "activity_type_code" TEXT /* Code indicating the type of activity (e.g., enplaned, deplaned) */,
  "cargo_type_code" TEXT /* Code indicating the type of cargo */,
  "cargo_aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft used for cargo transport */,
  "cargo_metric_tons" REAL /* Total cargo transported in metric tons */,
  "cargo_volume" REAL /* Total cargo volume transported in cubic meters */,
  "cargo_weight_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the cargo weight (e.g., kilograms, pounds) */,
  "cargo_volume_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the cargo volume (e.g., cubic meters, cubic feet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cargo_activities_geo_summary_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_summary_id") REFERENCES geo_summaries ("geo_summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cargo_activities_operating_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("operating_airline_id") REFERENCES operating_airlines ("operating_airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cargo_activities_cargo_type_code FOREIGN KEY ("cargo_type_code") REFERENCES cargo_types ("cargo_type_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cargo_activities_geo_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_region_id") REFERENCES geo_regions ("geo_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cargo_activities_cargo_aircraft_type FOREIGN KEY ("cargo_aircraft_type") REFERENCES cargo_aircraft_types ("cargo_aircraft_type_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cargo_activities_activity_type_code FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type_code") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_type_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cargo_activities_published_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("published_airline_id") REFERENCES published_airlines ("published_airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_airlines" (
  "operating_airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating airline */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code for the operating airline */,
  "airline_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the operating airline */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact details of the operating airline (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operating_airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "published_airlines" (
  "published_airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each published airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the published airline */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code for the published airline */,
  "airline_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the published airline */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact details of the published airline (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("published_airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_summaries" (
  "geo_summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical summary */,
  "geo_summary" TEXT /* Description of the geographical summary */,
  "geo_summary_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the geographical summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_summary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_regions" (
  "geo_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the geographical region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the geographical region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type_code" TEXT /* Code for the activity type */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  "activity_type_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cargo_types" (
  "cargo_type_code" TEXT /* Code for the cargo type */,
  "cargo_description" TEXT /* Description of the cargo type */,
  "cargo_type_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cargo type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cargo_type_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cargo_aircraft_types" (
  "cargo_aircraft_type_code" TEXT /* Code for the cargo aircraft type */,
  "aircraft_description" TEXT /* Description of the cargo aircraft type */,
  "aircraft_type_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cargo aircraft type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cargo_aircraft_type_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., tons, kilograms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cargo_metrics" (
  "cargo_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the cargo metric record */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cargo activity */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric being tracked */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cargo_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cargo_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cargo_metrics_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES cargo_activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report record */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cargo activity */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES cargo_activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cargo activity being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the activity */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Information about the device used to access the cargo activity (e.g., browser type, operating system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES cargo_activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
